refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and execute worksite tasks to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive equipment control algorithms to optimize operational parameters.
DP2: Task scheduling and dispatch system integrated with equipment control.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and productivity reporting subsystem.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive equipment control algorithms to optimize operational parameters.

potential_sources: Interaction between task scheduling and equipment control
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically separable but requires interfaces with DP2 and DP3 for data exchange; coupling is manageable with clear interface definitions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data for adaptive control.
Risk of suboptimal performance if task scheduling is not well integrated.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider refining DP2 and DP3 in subsequent decomposition levels to reduce coupling and clarify interfaces.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and embedded control systems responsible for equipment operational parameters and adaptive control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends operational data and productivity metrics to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives scheduled tasks and commands from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as adaptive control is core to vehicle operation; low diffusion risk.
Contains higher-level coordination but less direct control; moderate diffusion risk.
Primarily remote control; low containment for adaptive control DP.
Safety monitoring only; minimal containment for productivity control.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Adaptive equipment control algorithms are best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize interface complexity and ensure real-time responsiveness.
containment_risks: Potential integration challenges with task scheduling in NGHE Solution module.
Risk of delayed updates if telemetry interface bandwidth is limited.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Evaluate telemetry interface capacity and consider co-locating some scheduling functions if integration risks materialize.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR by providing adaptive control to optimize equipment operation, directly supporting productivity targets.

diffusion_risks: Moderate diffusion risk exists if task scheduling and telemetry interfaces are not well managed.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for DP; external interfaces are well defined and limited.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring productivity metrics and monitoring telemetry data from the Vehicle module during operations.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of adaptive control DP to Vehicle IM with defined interfaces to other modules.

recommended_revisions: Refine task scheduling and telemetry DPs and their IM assignments in next decomposition level.
Assess telemetry interface bandwidth and latency constraints.

decision.justification: While the current decomposition and assignments are sound, further refinement of sub-FRs and DPs related to task scheduling and telemetry is needed to reduce coupling and clarify interfaces before proceeding.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and execute worksite tasks to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time for feedback and adjustment.

revise.why: To decompose and clarify task scheduling and telemetry DPs and their IM assignments, reducing coupling and diffusion risks.

assumptions: Sensor data for adaptive control is accurate and timely.
Telemetry and tasking interfaces can support required data rates.
open_risks: Integration complexity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution modules.
Potential telemetry bandwidth limitations affecting real-time feedback.
evidence_needed: Performance data from prototype adaptive control algorithms.
Telemetry interface capacity and latency measurements.
